title: Opening for Store Manager at Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
